channel.title: Human Computer Interaction on Nemath Ahmed
channel.description: Recent content in Human Computer Interaction on Nemath Ahmed

item.title: Heard About Brain Computer Interfaces?
item.description: Heard About Brain Computer Interfaces? A brief look into what our future might be like! What would it be like to control everything around you just by the sense of thought? Imagine controlling a drone not by a physical controller but instead by the waves emitted from your brain. How cool would that be? And what if I told you there are prototypes for such brain-controlled drones currently in existence and that few years down the line you could own one.
